allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('current is_day:', d['weather']['current'].get\('is_day'\)\); print\('hourly[0] is_day:', d['weather']['hourly'][0].get\('is_day'\)\); print\('temp:', d['weather']['current']['temp']\)")
